name: EnvScope
subtitle: Context-Aware Frontend Security & Secret Detection Engine
description: A Chrome extension that scans live JavaScript bundles for exposed secrets, combining regex and AST analysis to catch high-risk leaks with low false positives.

name: TestPilot
subtitle: Intelligent Bug Detection & Telemetry Chrome Extension
description: A silent telemetry layer for web apps that captures console errors, failed requests, and performance metrics in real time, with no backend required.

name: AskSQLAI
subtitle: Schema-Aware Natural Language to SQL Generation Engine
description: Converts plain-English questions into safe, executable SQL by introspecting the live database schema, with layered guardrails against hallucinated tables or columns.

name: MeetlyAI
subtitle: AI-Powered Meeting Notes, Decisions & Action Items Generator
description: Turns raw meeting transcripts into structured summaries, decisions, and owned action items using strict JSON-schema-enforced prompting.

name: SearchlyAI
subtitle: Session-Based AI Search Engine using RAG over Documents & Web
description: A full RAG pipeline for semantic Q&A over uploaded documents and web pages, using FAISS vector search and Gemini responses grounded strictly in retrieved context.

name: SemanticFeed
subtitle: AI-Powered Tech News Aggregation & Deduplication Platform
description: Aggregates tech news from multiple sources, deduplicates related articles into unified stories, and generates concise AI summaries via scheduled background jobs.

name: QueryDoc
subtitle: Retrieval-Augmented Document Q&A System
description: A secure RAG chat system for a single uploaded PDF, supporting multi-question conversations with session-isolated vector storage and no stored credentials.

name: AI-Powered SOAP Note Generator
subtitle: Multi-Agent Medical Assistant
description: A multi-agent pipeline that extracts structured clinical data from patient conversations and generates guideline-backed, safety-checked SOAP notes.

name: Readme Creator
subtitle: AI-Powered README Generator
description: A web app for building structured, professional READMEs from templates, with live markdown preview and Gemini-powered content optimization.

name: Gemini PDF Analyzer
subtitle: Streamlit + GenAI Resume Parsing Tool
description: Extracts and parses resume PDFs into structured JSON, then generates a polished first-person summary using a selectable Gemini model.

name: EasyDiagno
subtitle: AI-Powered Symptom Checker
description: A cross-platform symptom-checking app with a chatbot interface, ML-based diagnosis, and a hospital locator with specialization filters.

name: Streamify
subtitle: Full Stack Chat App
description: A full-stack real-time messaging and video chat app supporting 100+ concurrent users, with screen sharing and image sharing built in.
